items.trigger: A longform or book-like material is being converted into a ReaderLab package.
items.input: A compliant full-body source and a target package directory.
steps: Retain the full body under 10_一手正文/.
Write the companion page as support rather than replacement.
items.output: A reading package with a complete body artifact and a separate companion page.
items.boundary: Does not prove external book validation or reader acceptance by itself.
items.decision_reason: Operational enough to guide this demo, but still part of a broader product workflow rather than a standalone formal Skill.

items.candidate: Use the sequence preserve source, accompany reading, then capture candidates as a general product pattern.
items.input: A material source and reader goal.
items.decision_reason: Downgraded because the repeatable trigger and boundary are not precise enough for Skillization.

items.candidate: Turn the product spec directly into a formal ReaderLab Skill.
items.boundary: Formal Skill drafting is explicitly out of scope for this internal demo.
items.decision_reason: Rejected because it lacks trigger/input/steps/output/evidence and violates current phase scope.

items.candidate: Treat fluent AI explanation as a substitute for reading the source.
items.boundary: This is a hazard, not a reusable operation.
items.decision_reason: Rejected as a Skill candidate because it is the failure mode the product is designed to prevent.
